dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I need someone with no ties to this mess. Someone who'll look at the evidence instead of the gossip.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_item} vanished from the storehouse two nights ago. {target_npc} was the last person seen near the building, so naturally everyone has decided they're guilty. But I know {target_npc}, and they wouldn't steal. The real thief left tracks heading {location_hint}, but nobody cares because they've already made up their minds.
dialogueChunks.outro: If I don't find proof of who actually took the goods before the council meets, {target_npc} gets banished. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} at stake. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_is} poisoning everything. {quest_reward_hint} awaits if we set things right.

dialogueChunks.intro: People are whispering, {player_name}, and the whispers are getting louder. I need help before they turn into shouts.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} has been leaving at odd hours and meeting with travelers nobody recognizes. The settlement thinks it's conspiracy. The truth is quieter: {target_npc} has been bartering for {quest_item} to surprise the community with something beneficial, but the sellers are from a rival settlement and the meetings had to be secret. I need you to find the traders {location_hint} and bring back proof of what was actually being exchanged.
dialogueChunks.outro: One misunderstood kindness is about to destroy a good person's reputation. Saving {quest_stakes_the} depends on setting the record straight. {quest_threat_The} only grows worse on its own.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, half this settlement thinks the other half is cheating them, and it's about to boil over.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The rationing system has people convinced that {target_npc} is giving extra portions to favorites. I've seen the ledgers, and every distribution is fair. But perception beats reality when bellies are growling. The real shortage is because {enemy_type_plural} have been raiding the supply wagons {location_hint}. If I can recover {quest_item} from the raided wagons and show that the missing supplies went to monsters, not neighbors, maybe people will stop blaming each other.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_has} made everyone suspicious. Proof that nobody is cheating will calm things down. Protecting {quest_stakes_the} depends on it. Before {quest_time_pressure}.
